channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saudi Arabia club Al-Hilal says contract with Neymar has been terminated by mutual consent
item.description: RIO DE JANEIRO (AP) — Saudi Arabia club Al-Hilal said Monday it reached an agreement with striker Neymar to terminate his contract by mutual consent.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Love ties it with halfcourt shot at buzzer, Arizona knocks off No. 3 Iowa State 86-75 in OT
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Caleb Love hit a tying heave from beyond halfcourt at the end of regulation and made two more 3-pointers in overtime, finishing with 22 points and lifting Arizona to an 86-75 win over No. 3 Iowa State on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flagg's big 2nd half helps No. 2 Duke hold off NC State 74-64 to stay unbeaten in ACC
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Star freshman Cooper Flagg scored 23 of his 28 points after halftime to help No. 2 Duke hold off North Carolina State 74-64 on Monday night. Fellow rookie Kon Knueppel had 19 points for the Blue Devils (18-2, 10-0 Atlantic Coast Conference), who have won 14 straight games.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Thompson hits game-winning shot and scores 33 points as Rockets rally past Celtics 114-112
item.description: Amen Thompson hit a game-winning floater with 0.7 seconds left and finished with 33 points to lead the Houston Rockets to a 114-112 victory over the Boston Celtics.
item.dc:creator: Ken Powtak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Anthony Davis scores 42 points, grabs 23 rebounds as Lakers top Hornets 112-107 for 4th straight win
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Anthony Davis had 42 points and 23 rebounds, and the Los Angeles Lakers used a huge first quarter from the All-Star center to build a 23-point lead before beating the Charlotte Hornets 112-107 on Monday night for their fourth straight win.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump congratulates Chiefs, 'MAGA' fan base while making bold Bills prediction
item.description: President Donald Trump congratulated the Kansas City Chiefs on heading to their third straight Super Bowl appearance while making a bold prediction about the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Person seen firing gun into air amid crowd of Philadelphia Eagles fans; police investigating
item.description: Video of the alleged incident, shared to X late on Sunday, appeared to show a large crowd celebrating the Eagles' win when a person raised the gun into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs hold off Bills to secure shot at history in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs have a shot at NFL history, as they took down the Buffalo Bills to win the AFC Championship for the third straight season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Kneepkens scores 32 as Utes hold off BYU, 81-76
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Gianna Kneepkens played against BYU, she suffered a season-ending knee injury in December of 2023. This time around, Kneepkens had one of the best days of her career.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tiger Woods' golf tournament moves from L.A. to San Diego due to fires
item.description: Tiger Woods' PGA golf tournament is moving from the Los Angeles area to San Diego as a result of the fires ravaging Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Jaguars hire Bucs OC Liam Coen as head coach after making necessary moves
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen as the eighth head coach in franchise history Friday, capping a covert operation that included owner Shad Khan moving on from general manager Trent Baalke and Coen reversing course with the Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC shuts out Minnesota for third straight victory
item.description: ST. PAUL (AP) - Karel Vejmelka made 26 saves for his first shutout of the season, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-0 at Xcel Energy Center on Thursday. “We did a great job,” Vejmelka said. “Boys played real well in front of me and they helped me a lot.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Military heroes honored at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The Farmers Insurance Open is not just showcasing some of the world’s best golfers — it’s also paying tribute to the heroes of our nation, offering service members special access and recognition throughout the week.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes crushed by #7 Houston, 70-36
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Riding a three-game winning streak, the Runnin' Utes had gained some confidence the last couple of weeks. But Wednesday night against #7 Houston, the Utes came crashing back down to Earth. Milos Uzan scored 14 points, L.J. Cryer added 13 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, WGN 9
